observation_induced_collapse_and_collaps.reason: Typed Cesaro observation, fixed-component projection, convergence, Cauchy, and collapse-divergence residuals.

fixed_point_consistency_and_trivial_coll.reason: Typed finite closure lattice with monotonicity, extensivity, idempotence, fixed-output, and fixed-set certificates.

observation_definiteness_equivalence_and.reason: Typed finite observation transition with stabilization depths, eventual idempotence, and failure-set partition.

definite_state_projection_and_state_ambi.reason: Typed PVM/Luders instrument with Born normalization, projector orthogonality, conditional-state normalization, and repeatability.

ergodic_collapse_projection_and_non_conv.reason: Typed involution-to-projector ergodic realization with algebraic, geometric, orthogonality, fixed-range, and convergence boundaries.

involutive_collapse_spectral_pinning_and.reason: Involutive spectral pinning with fixed/antifixed projectors, Cesaro selection, drift defects, and three-source removal gates.

collapse_spectral_selection_and_spectral.reason: Hermitian spectral selection with invariant projector, Cesaro multiplier, spectral weights, entropy, and three-source removal gates.

observation_dimensional_binding_and_dime.reason: Commuting-projector common fixed-core field with dimension, projection, stability, and both-source closure gates.

observable_locality_and_collapse_inacces.reason: Localized temporal/spectral observation field with exact support, projector, and both-source closure residuals.
